LAW AND MOTION 301, TRIAL IN THIS MATTER IS SCHEDULED FOR 01/12/04. THE COURT CONTINUES COUNSEL ANDREW DIMITRIOU'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT RONALD LUM TO 01-12-04 IN DEPT. 301. THE COURT RECOMMENDS THAT ATTORNEY DIMITRIOU OBTAIN A BRIEF CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL SO THAT DEFENDANT CAN OBTAIN COUNSEL. COURT FURTHER STATES THAT IF A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL IS GRANTED, THE MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT LUM WILL BE GRANTED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

LAW AND MOTION 301, COURT FINDS JUST CAUSE TO HOLD IN CAMERA PROCEEDINGS IN THIS MATTER. IN CAMERA PROCEEDINGS. COUNSEL ANDREW DIMITRIOU'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT RONALD LUM IS GRANTED; ATTORNEY DIMITRIOU IS TO COMPLY WITH RULES OF PROFESSIONAL CONDUCT 3-700D AND THE ORDER IS CONTINGENT ON THE PARTIES ADVISING THE PRESIDING JUDGE OF THIS COURT'S RULING. A PORTION OF THE DEFENDANT'S FILE IS DELIVERED TO HIM. THE TRANSCRIPT OF TODAY'S PROCEEDINGS IS ORDERED SEALED. ALL DOCUMENTS PRESENTED DURING THE IN CAMERA HEARING ARE RETURNED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

Court Trial

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-22-2004 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-12-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew Dimitriou, Esq. (415) 434-1144 Moving Party to be Relieved As Counsel
Ronald Lum, Defendant (415) 777-3717, Defendant
RULING:
Also present are Nancy Lawlor, associate of Attorney Dimitriou, and Lauren Gelber, law clerk for Attorney Dimitriou. Court finds just cause to hold in camera proceedings in this matter. IN CAMERA PROCEEDINGS. COUNSEL ANDREW DIMITRIOU'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for Defendant Ronald Lum is GRANTED; Attorney Dimitriou is to comply with Rules of Professional Conduct 3-700D and the order is contingent on the parties advising the Presiding Judge of this Court's ruling. A portion of the Defendant's file is delivered to him. The transcript of today's proceedings is ordered sealed. All documents presented during the In Camera hearing are returned. Order signed. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-12-2004 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-08-2004 Continued To Jan-12-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew Dimitriou, Esq. (415) 434-1144 Moving Party to be Relieved As Counsel
Ronald Lum, Defendant (415) 777-3717
David Blumenfeld, Esq., Woo & Associates (415) 705-6470 for Plaintiff
RULING:
HEARING HELD. Trial in this matter is scheduled for 01/12/04. The Court CONTINUES
COUNSEL ANDREW DIMITRIOU'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for Defendant Ronald Lum to 01-12-04 in Dept. 301. The Court recommends that Attorney Dimitriou obtain a brief continuance of the trial so that Defendant can obtain counsel. Court further states that if a continuance of the trial is granted, the Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel For Defendant Lum will be granted. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-31-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
David Blumenfeld, Esq., Woo & Associates (415) 705-6470 for Plaintiff and Moving Party Golden Horse Trading Company, Inc.'s Motion For Summary Judgment
Andrew Dimitriou, Esq., Dimitriou & Associates (415) 434-1144 for Defendant and Moving Party Lum's Motion For Summary Judgment
RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT RONALD LUM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: DENIED. Counsel to submit a form of order. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
Off Calendar Dec-31-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
David Blumenfeld, Esq., Woo & Associates (415) 705-6470 for Plaintiff and Moving Party Golden Horse Trading Company, Inc.'s Motion For Summary Judgment
Andrew Dimitriou, Esq., Dimitriou & Associates (415) 434-1144 for Defendant and Moving Party Lum's Motion For Summary Judgment
RULING:
A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF GOLDEN HORSE TRADING COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (UNLAWFUL DETAINER) is DENIED. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2003 Continued To Dec-31-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew Dimitriou, Esq., Dimitriou & Associates (415) 434-1144 for Defendant and Moving Party Lum
David Blumenfeld, Esq., Woo & Associates (415) 705-6470 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Golden Horse Trading Company
RULING:
Opposition filed today is untimely. Trial in this matter is set for 12/15/03; DEFENDANT RONALD LUM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is OFF CALENDAR; the motion is referred to the trial department.
Subsequently, Dept 206 returns Defendant Lum's Motion for Summary Judgment to Dept 301. On the Court's own motion, Defendant Lum's Motion for Summary Judgment is CONTINUED to 12/31/03. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.
